---
title: "Harmonize Data"
date: today
---

## Overview

Once raw microdata is available on datalibweb, it is harmonized to the **50by35 schema** (see [Schema & Variable Dictionary](05-schema.qmd)). Harmonization maps survey-specific variables, codes, and units onto the mandatory and optional variables defined by the schema, so that welfare and self-reliance indicators are comparable across surveys, countries, and years.

## Sample harmonization scripts

Example harmonization scripts covering 15 country/survey combinations are available in the `Stata/` folder of this repository. They are not intended to be used as-is, but illustrate the harmonization process and provide a starting point for writing survey-specific scripts. "Refugee definition" is abbreviated below ŌĆö see each script's header comment for the full sample restriction. `welfare_self` formulas omit the floor-at-zero (and, where applicable, cap-at-`welfare`) wrapper for brevity ŌĆö see the script for the exact expression:

| `code` | `year` | `survname` | Welfare | Refugee definition | `welfare_self` | Script |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| TCD | 2018 | EHCVM | Consumption | `pop_group` 1ŌĆō2 (east/south refugee) | `welfare` ŌłÆ `income_aid` (HH aid income) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/TCD_2018_EHCVM_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| TCD | 2022 | EHCVM | Consumption | `pop_group` 1ŌĆō2, 6 (+other-country refugee) | `welfare` ŌłÆ `income_aid` (HH aid income) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/TCD_2022_EHCVM_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| NER | 2018 | EHCVM | Consumption | `pop_group` 2 (Mali), 3 (Nigeria); IDPs (1) excluded | `welfare` ŌłÆ `income_aid` (HH aid income) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/NER_2018_EHCVM_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| COL | 2022 | GEIH | Income | `refugee==1`, Venezuelan-born only | `welfare` ŌłÆ `inc_transf_inst` (institutional/gov't transfers) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/COL_2022_GEIH_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| COL | 2023 | GEIH | Income | `refugee==1`, Venezuelan-born only | `welfare` ŌłÆ `inc_transf_inst` (institutional/gov't transfers) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/COL_2023_GEIH_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| UGA | 2018 | RHS | Consumption | `refugee_status==1` | `cons_agg_less_aid` (consumption net of aid, source-provided) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/UGA_2018_RHS_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| JOR | 2021 | VAF | Consumption | `Nationality` 1ŌĆō2 (Syrian, urban/camp) | `pce_without_assistance` (consumption net of aid, source-provided) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/JOR_2021_VAF_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| JOR | 2023 | VAF | Consumption | `Nationality` 1ŌĆō2 (Syrian, urban/camp) | `pce_without_assistance` (consumption net of aid, source-provided) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/JOR_2023_VAF_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| LBN | 2023 | VASYR | Consumption | `head_nationality==192` (Syria) | `CAwosocialasst` (consumption net of social assistance, source-provided) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/LBN_2023_VASYR_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| PSE | 2023 | PECS | Consumption | `refugee==1` (UNRWA-registered) | `welfare` ├Ś (`cons_hh_n_noaid` / `cons_hh_n`) (nominal no-aid/total consumption ratio) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/PSE_2023_PECS_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| ETH | 2022 | SESRE | Consumption | `sample_type` 2ŌĆō3 (out-/in-camp) | `total_exp_pre` (pre-assistance consumption, source-provided) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/ETH_2022_SESRE_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| CRI | 2023 | ENAHO | Income | `lugnac==2` (born in Nicaragua) | `itf` ŌłÆ (`timas_hh` + `ts_hh`) (HH assistance/subsidy transfers), then per-capita/PPP-converted | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/CRI_2023_ENAHO_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| CRI | 2024 | ENAHO | Income | `lugnac==2` (born in Nicaragua) | `itf` ŌłÆ (`timas_hh` + `ts_hh`) (HH assistance/subsidy transfers), then per-capita/PPP-converted | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/CRI_2024_ENAHO_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| CMR | 2025 | FDS | Consumption | `pops==1` ŌĆö ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ combined refugee/asylum-seeker code, not separable in source data | `nom_cons_minus_aid` (consumption net of aid, source-provided) | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/CMR_2025_FDS_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| CHL | 2022 | CASEN | Income | Mother's country VEN/COL/HTI (proxy) | `ytotcorh` ŌłÆ `yaimcorh` (HH assistance/subsidy income), then per-adult-equivalent-converted | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/CHL_2022_CASEN_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |

Common conventions across all scripts:

- **Sample**: refugees only ŌĆö the 50by35 monitoring population excludes IDPs and asylum-seekers. Each script's comment header documents the full survey-specific classification (population group codes, nationality, birth country, etc.). One exception: Cameroon FDS 2025 codes refugees and asylum-seekers under a single combined category (`pops==1`) with no variable in any of the raw files to separate them ŌĆö flagged in that script and pending a fix from the source data provider.
- **`welfare`**: the survey's official welfare aggregate, converted to **annual per capita LCU**.
- **`welfare_self`**: welfare net of humanitarian/social assistance (per capita, same periodicity and deflation as `welfare`), floored at zero and capped at `welfare`. Where the source provides a net-of-aid aggregate directly (e.g. Uganda's `cons_agg_less_aid`), that is used; otherwise assistance is netted out of the underlying income/consumption components before the same per-capita/deflation/annualization transformation applied to `welfare`. Confirm the final definition with the 50by35 methodology team.
- **Sentinel codes** (e.g. `age == 9999`) are converted to system missing.

After harmonizing, check the file against the schema before upload:

::: {.panel-tabset}

## R

```r
library(haven)
source("R/validate_50by35.R")

df <- read_dta("data/processed/<SurveyID>_WELF.dta")
validate_50by35(df)
```

## Stata

```stata
use "data/processed/<SurveyID>_WELF.dta", clear
do "Stata/validate_50by35.do"
```

:::
